author: y4rr
content: Divergence found in conformance_distributions_discrete::multinomial_fixtures_log_prob_mean_variance. d.mean() returns Err(InvalidArgument { message: 'mean not implemented for this distribution' }). Multinomial::mean should return total_count * probs[k] per category; variance should return total_count * probs[k] * (1 - probs[k]). Both methods fall through to the Distribution trait default error impl — they are simply not overridden in multinomial.rs.
